etymology.description: semantic 女(女) (nǚ, "woman") + phonetic 乃(乃) (nǎi) -> milk
etymology.interpretation: 奶(nǎi, "milk") combines 女(女) (nǚ, "woman"), linking to maternal qualities or nurturing, with the phonetic 乃(乃) (nǎi), providing the sound. This reflects the role of women in breastfeeding or producing milk.

examples.chinese: 我喜欢喝牛奶(我喜歡喝牛奶)。
婴儿需要母奶(嬰兒需要母奶)。
奶茶是我最喜欢的饮料(奶茶是我最喜歡的飲料)。
examples.pinyin: Nǎichá shì wǒ zuì xǐhuān de yǐnliào.
examples.english: Milk tea is my favorite drink.
